results.title: About Us | Omni-Biotic - Premium Probiotic Supplements
results.raw_content:
In 2019, we launched AllergoSan USA to introduce the first Omni-Biotic products in the United States. Today, thousands of healthcare practitioners worldwide trust Omni-Biotic to address their patients’ gut health concerns, and millions use our probiotics daily. We're proud to make these innovative products available to more wellness seekers than ever before.

## Our Team

The dedicated AllergoSan USA team is family-led and based in New York. The Kleinfelds, with their diverse industry backgrounds and fields of expertise, are united by a shared passion for the transformative power of gut health.

Klaus Kleinfeld CEO

##### Klaus Kleinfeld CEO [...] Klaus Kleinfeld CEO

##### Klaus Kleinfeld CEO

Klaus has run several Fortune 500 companies, and is currently pursuing a variety of projects that he deeply believes in. After experiencing the profound health benefits of Omni-Biotic, he met with founder Anita Frauwallner, who inspired him to learn more about targeted probiotic supplements. This journey culminated in founding AllergoSan USA with his daughters.

Hannah Kleinfeld COO

##### Hannah Kleinfeld COO

Hannah received her undergraduate degree from Yale and her master’s from Harvard Business School. She has worked at McKinsey & Co with a focus on healthcare, and in the strategy & operations team at Boston Medical Center. Hannah first used Omni-Biotic to restore her gut health after a severe case of Lyme disease.

Lena Kleinfeld CMO [...] #### When her first husband passed away from colon cancer at a young age, Austrian pharmacist Anita Frauwallner became a passionate investigator of the gut microbiome and an advocate for probiotics as an accessible and effective health tool. She went on to found Institut AllergoSan in 1991, setting in motion a pioneering force in modern probiotic science.

Two round pads of probiotic supplement powder, emphasizing Omni-Biotic's unique powder delivery mechanism, which ensures significantly higher probiotic survival when compared to other leading U.S. brands

#### 30 years after its founding, Institut Allergosan is still based in Austria but has attained global renown, with an ever expanding body of microbiome research and Omni-Biotic products retailing in countries all over the world. [...] Lena Kleinfeld CMO

##### Lena Kleinfeld CMO

Lena spearheads Communications and Marketing at AllergoSan USA. She holds a degree in Media, Culture, and Communications from NYU and worked for several years in Corporate Communications at Lionsgate. Lena has also experienced the power of Omni-Biotic firsthand, using a combination of these products to manage her chronic eczema.

Institut AllergoSan developing supplements for holistic health

#### Institut AllergoSan’s team of scientists has studied the connections between the gut and other systems of the human body, developing supplements that empower holistic health and wellbeing.

Diane von Furstenberg recommends Omni-Biotic for gut health [...] #### How Long Has Omni-Biotic Been On The Market For?

OMNi-BiOTiC®was developed by Institut AllergoSan in Graz, Austria. Institut AllergoSan was founded in 1991 and launched its first probiotic supplement in 1993. Over the last 25 years, Institut AllergoSan has become an internationally recognized center for research and formulation of natural products that support the wellbeing of the body by strengthening the gut.

The OMNi-BiOTiC®product line is the #1 probiotic brand in Europe. Now, OMNi-BiOTiC®is also available in the U.S.

#### What Kind Of Testing Do You Do On Omni-Biotic Supplements?
